meaning: n.肋状组织翅,肋骨,棱条配置,肋材购架,田垄,玩笑
examples: I got quite a lot of ribbing from my teammates.
Chamberlain was the loudest presence, yelling at teammates again, and they were ribbing him right back.
As Chuck is standing there, the other guys all start to give him a good ribbing.
The breezy interviews, the high-profile gets, the suspenders and the endless ribbing about his marriages.
